title: Dolphin Workflow
description: Schema for .workflow.yaml files — multi-step DAG tasks executed by run_workflow. Steps without depends_on run in parallel; steps with depends_on wait for their dependencies.

name.description: Unique workflow name. Used as the .result.yaml filename and the workflow identifier in logs.

description.description: Optional human-readable description, shown in progress output.

steps.description: Ordered list of steps. Execution order is determined by depends_on, not array order — steps with no depends_on or same-level dependencies run in parallel.

id.description: Unique step identifier within this workflow. Referenced by depends_on and template shortcuts ($step_id.field).

prompt.description: Task description for this step. Supports template shortcuts: $step.field, $each, $each.key, $step[*].field. Can also use Go template syntax {{.step.field}} directly.

depends_on.description: Step IDs this step waits for. The step starts only after all dependencies complete successfully.

foreach.description: Fan-out: repeats this step once per element of an upstream step's array output. Value is a template reference like "$list_step.field". The current element is available as $each inside the prompt. Requires the referenced upstream step to have an output_schema with an array field.

output_schema.description: Optional JSON schema for structured step output. Keys are field names, values are type strings (string, number, boolean) or arrays of a type (e.g. [string]). Used by foreach to extract array fields.

timeout.description: Per-step timeout, e.g. "60s", "5m". Default 300s. Set to 0 to disable the timeout for this step.

max_tokens.description: Max output tokens for this step's LLM call. Overrides the global default.

checkpoint.description: When true, the engine pauses after this step completes. The .result.yaml is written to disk; review it and call continue_workflow to resume. Useful before dangerous or irreversible actions.
